author: tmiychao
content:

This week we continue with proper office hours guests, hosting Etan on Wednesday https://github.com/eth-protocol-fellows/cohort-seven/issues/139

author: vivek_singh_solanki
content:
Hey everyone,

I'm finalizing to take up the Pureth: SSZ Execution Blocks project in Geth, and I'm now moving to the proposal-crafting stage, so posting this here to avoid any clashes.

Quick background: I was initially looking to take this project up in Reth, but since some fellows reached out to me that they are already pairing on the two connected Pureth projects there, I pivoted to Geth. Before settling on it, I went through almost everyone's weekly updates and did not see anyone targeting this project in Geth. I also connected with Tamaghna about the client choice and he was fine with me going with Geth.

If this clashes with what anyone else is planning, please reach out to me so we can sort it out early.

Thanks!
